title: AST DUI and MICS: Seward [AK25056976]
summary: On 06/14/2025 at about 1909 hours, Seward AST conducted a traffic stop on the Seward Highway in Seward. The driver was identified as Tonya Davis, 40 YOA of Seward, and the passenger was identified as Stephanie Bruce, 40 YOA of Seward. The investigation revealed that Tonya Davis was driving under the influence of drugs. Tonya Davis was issued a misdemeanor citation for DUI and given a mandatory court appearance. Seward AST seized Stephanie Bruce's backpack pending the application of a search warrant and released her from the scene. On 06/18/2025, Seward AST executed a search warrant on Stephanie Bruce's backpack which revealed she was in possession of fentanyl powder, methamphetamine, a digital scale, and packaging materials. Stephanie Bruce was placed under arrest for two counts of MICS in
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Cyber Crime: Tok [AK25059341]
summary: On 6/19/25, at 1113 hours, a Tok residence came to Post reporting he had received a text message stating he owned DMV fines and were requesting a cash payments. The text messages was threating if payment was not made his vehicle registration would be suspended along with his driver's licence. AST Fairbanks Dispatch also confirmed they had received hundreds of complaints about this scam on 6/19/25. An online internet crime complaint was filed with the FBI. Investigation is on going in this matter.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: would be suspended along with his driver's licence

title: Wrangell woman charged for sexual abuse of three minors
summary: (Sage Smiley/KSTK) Alaska state prosecutor Whitney Bostick charged a Wrangell woman with three felonies for an alleged sexual abuse act on three minors aged 13-15 years old. Judge Amanda Browning arraigned 32-year-old Rebecca Mork Monday in the Wrangell Courthouse. Mork pleaded not guilty. The charg...

title: AST DVPO Violation: Fairbanks [AK25059216]
summary: On 06/18/2025 at approximately 2027 hours, Alaska State Troopers in Fairbanks received a report of a DVPO violation. Investigation revealed Jeffery Labrenz, 59 YOA, violated a DVPO. Labrenz was remanded to FCC.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
